source_refs: Project evidence: homepage One-Touch Experience section background role
business_goal: Support the One-Touch Experience section with a credible integrated operations background that strengthens technical trust
page_role: Homepage One-Touch Experience background poster image
visual_message: A real control, monitoring, or integrated operations environment that feels dependable and system-level
iteration_hypothesis: A calmer operations backdrop with strong realism anchors will support overlay content better than a literal busy control room snapshot

technical_signals.aperture: f/2.8 to f/4 with controlled depth
technical_signals.light_source: soft interior illumination with restrained screen glow
technical_signals.motion_rule: still environment with no dramatic action blur

spatial_positioning: main monitoring or equipment zone sits behind the overlay area
background should retain readable depth without cluttering the panel area
architectural negative space stays available for section content layering
visual_standard: corporate interior systems photography with restrained industrial mood
color_restriction: charcoal, matte grey, muted steel, controlled cyan or green display accents only; avoid neon or purple cast
material_notes: glass or acrylic partitions if present
realistic rack, console, or wall-display surfaces
screen glow without synthetic plastic sheen
reality_anchor: credible monitoring wall or data-room context
clear spatial depth with realistic equipment

composition_rule.hero_safe_area: preserve space for overlay list and heading
composition_rule.focal_structure: one primary background anchor and one supporting depth layer
composition_rule.camera: architectural interior photography, eye-level or slightly elevated

lighting_rule.surface_behavior: clean reflections and believable display light

disallowed_ai_signals: excessive server-room cliché without systems context
HUD overlays or floating data graphics
